description_long: This is a woven-style grocery bag with a cream-colored base and intricate, colorful geometric patterns. The upper rim features a repeating border of red, blue, and yellow motifs, while the main body displays a large, central star-shaped design in similar colors. The bag has two long, thin loop handles attached symmetrically to the top, allowing for easy carrying over the shoulder. The surface appears to have a slightly textured, fabric-like finish, suggesting a blend of durability and flexibility. The bag is empty, maintaining a slightly tapered, structured form with a wide opening at the top.
description: A cream-colored woven grocery bag with colorful geometric patterns and two long loop handles, featuring a large star motif and a decorative border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central star pattern and the decorative border along the top rim, with both handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the bag's narrow profile and the continuation of the top border pattern, with both handles aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same star motif and border, and both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's slim profile and the patterned rim.
attribute_branding_or_logo: colorful geometric printed design, no text or branding
